{{Infobox starship
| name = Skimmer Drive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is a state-of-the-art propulsion system that resembles a twisted knot of metal tubes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is an object the narrator is attending to.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is a device that uses [[Aether]] and can fail.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
